title: Site Configuration
description: Per-site configuration for the SEO agent suite. One file per site you want the agent to operate on.

id.description: Stable identifier (kebab-case). Used as run dir name + dashboard agent id suffix.

mode.description: implement = data → analyze → write code → test → deploy → email (full agent loop). recommend = data → analyze → email recommendations only (no shipping). Use recommend for sites you don't own the codebase to.

site_url.description: GSC site identifier — sc-domain:example.com or https://example.com/

default_country_filter.description: ISO-3 country code for the US-segment derived files.

property_id.description: GA4 property numeric id, as a string.

db.description: Optional: production-DB stats. Set to null/omit for sites without a backend you can query.

container.description: For type=docker-exec: container name to docker exec into.

queries_file.description: Path (relative to config) to SQL or .js script that emits stats JSON to stdout.

google_ads.description: Optional: Google Ads account. Pulls 90d search-terms, keyword performance, ad copy, and the paid-vs-organic 'goldmine' report. Skip block to disable.

customer_id.description: Google Ads customer id (digits only, no dashes). MCC-managed or non-MCC both supported.

developer_token.description: Developer token for the Google Ads API. Treated as a secret — keep out of git.

login_customer_id.description: MCC manager account id, only required if customer_id is below an MCC. Digits only.

page_inventory.description: Optional: page-type inventory crawl rules. Each rule names a page type and the regex its URLs match in the sitemap. The collector samples up to sample_size URLs (preferring GSC-impression-rich pages) and crawls them so the analyzer can run page-type-aware audits. Empty/missing = skip the inventory crawl entirely.

type.description: Page-type label (e.g. recipe, product, head_to_head, article, feature, shop_category, hardware).

sitemap_pattern.description: Regex matched against each sitemap URL's path (or full URL). Anchored matching is up to the regex.

sample_size.description: Max URLs to sample per run. Sampling is weighted toward GSC-impression-rich pages when GSC data is available, else random.

articles.description: Optional: site-articles inventory. The collector pulls every published article slug from the configured DB sources, joins with GSC pages-90d data, and writes data/articles-inventory.json. The analyzer surfaces SEO-boost recs (snippet-rewrite, title-fix, orphan-boost) per published article. When audit_full_body=true, body_md is also pulled so the analyzer's revenue_focus pass can scan for product mentions missing tagged Amazon links. Unconfigured sites skip the inventory step cleanly.

domain.description: Public domain for the URL templates (e.g. 'specpicks.com').

dsn_env.description: Name of the env var holding the Postgres DSN. Either dsn_env OR dsn must be set.

dsn.description: Literal Postgres DSN. Prefer dsn_env in committed configs to avoid leaking credentials.

audit_full_body.description: When true, the collector pulls body_md alongside slug+title (capped 200KB/article) so the analyzer's revenue_focus pass can scan article bodies for product mentions that lack tagged affiliate links.

audit_all.description: When true, every published article is audited every run instead of being sampled. Enables comprehensive article-level SEO coverage at the cost of larger run dirs.

query.description: SELECT statement; result must include at least slug + title columns. When articles.audit_full_body=true, also include a 'body' column (typically 'body_md AS body').

url_template.description: URL pattern like 'https://{domain}/reviews/{slug}' — {domain} and {slug} are substituted at collect time.

coverage_targets.description: Optional: studio-supplies-style content engine. The analyzer counts pages matching each pattern in the sitemap and emits new-page-<type> recs when count < expected_min. Each entry is a page-type label whose value declares the regex + expectations.

sitemap_pattern.description: Regex matched against sitemap URL paths.

expected_min.description: Floor below which the analyzer emits new-page recs.

expected_from_db.description: Optional: dynamic floor read from db-stats.json. The named query result must be a single integer.

rec_priority.description: Priority tag the analyzer attaches to new-page recs from this target.

horizon_weeks.description: How many weeks the analyzer expects this gap to take to close — drives rec ordering.

json_ld.description: Schema.org type(s) the page should emit (e.g. 'Article', 'WebPage + Brand + BreadcrumbList').

min_words.description: Minimum word count the implementer should aim for when generating these pages.

min_internal_links.description: Minimum internal links for SEO depth.

title_template.description: Template the article-author/implementer uses when proposing titles for this type.

revenue_focus.description: Optional: drives Amazon-affiliate-revenue-aware audits. When enabled, the analyzer scans article bodies for product mentions missing tagged Amazon links, boosts rec priority for changes touching is_featured products, and biases new-page recs toward content that names featured products. Leave out (or enabled=false) for sites that don't monetize via Amazon Associates.

goal.description: One-line goal statement reproduced verbatim in rec rationale (e.g. 'Drive Amazon affiliate purchases').

amazon_associate_tag.description: Your Amazon Associates ID (e.g. 'specpicks-20'). Empty → analyzer treats every Amazon outbound link as untagged (conservative).

associate_tag.description: Alias for amazon_associate_tag — accepted for backwards compatibility.

product_url_template.description: URL pattern for the site's own PDPs, e.g. 'https://specpicks.com/products/{asin}'. The analyzer counts these as 'attributed' since the site server-renders a tagged Amazon button.

pdp_path_prefix.description: Path prefix of product_url_template — derived from product_url_template if omitted.

sales_kpi.description: Which revenue_kpis[] entry id is being optimized.

featured_url_pattern.description: Optional regex pattern that identifies featured PDP URLs in the sitemap. Used by analyzer to weight rec priority.

featured_products_query.description: Reference to a @@QUERY:<name> in queries_file that returns the featured product set. Default: '@@QUERY:featured_products'.

high_intent_page_types.description: Page types audited extra hard (last click before referral).

priority_boost.description: Multipliers applied by the analyzer when scoring rec priority on revenue-touching changes.

preferred_rec_types.description: Rec type ranking — analyzer prefers these when within max_recs_per_run budget.

article_renderer_files.description: Files the implementer should edit when adding inline affiliate links to articles. Override the heuristic defaults (frontend/src/pages/ArticleDetailPage.tsx, src/services/article-renderer.ts) with the actual paths in your repo.

sitemap_url.description: Optional: override sitemap URL. Defaults to https://<site.domain>/sitemap.xml. Index sitemaps are auto-followed.

revenue_kpis.description: Conversion events the agent should track + use for revenue-goal scoring. Empty array = pure rank/traffic focus.

label.description: Human label for emails (e.g., 'Instacart cart creates').

ga4_event.description: GA4 event name to track. Empty if DB-only.

db_table.description: DB table to count rows from. Optional.

max_llm_audit_pages.description: Cap on number of pages fed to the LLM audit pass per run. Caps cost.

pre_traffic_impr_threshold.description: When the site's GSC 90d total_impressions is below this, the analyzer flips into pre-traffic mode and biases toward new-page (content-engine) recs over rank-target recs.

ai_provider.description: Optional override for the LLM provider used by the analyzer's audit pass.

ai_model.description: Optional override for the LLM model used by the analyzer's audit pass.

implementer.description: Required if site.mode=implement. The implementer edits files in repo_path.

repo_path.description: Absolute path to the site's source repo on disk.

commit_message_template.description: Template, %s = run summary. Default: 'SEO agent run %s'.

deployer.description: Required if site.mode=implement. Pluggable: any sequence of test/build/push/deploy commands.

cmd.description: Test command. Hard gate: any non-zero exit aborts the run before deploy.
{tag} placeholder substituted with a date-time tag. {image} from deploy.vars.

agent_id.description: Agent id in the dashboard (one or more sites can roll up to one agent id, or each site can have its own).

auth.description: Where Google OAuth credentials live. The collector calls refresh-token.py against this.

runs_root.description: Where per-run output dirs are created. Each run writes to <runs_root>/<site.id>/<UTC-ts>/.
